skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: Which of the following speeds is equivalent to 72 kilometers per hour? (1 kilometer = 1,000 meters)
rationale:
Choice C is correct. 72 km/hr equals 72,000 meters per hour. Since 1 hour = 3,600 seconds, the speed is 72,000 ÷ 3,600 = 20 meters per second.

Choices A and B are incorrect and may result from arithmetic errors. Choice D is incorrect and may result from failing to fully convert hours to seconds.
